name: Salsa Verde (Vtjs99b)
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp canned serrano chilis, drained, rinsed, and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the tomatoes, onions, cilantro, chili, garlic, salt, and pepper.
2. Mix gently but thoroughly together until well combined.
3. Taste for seasoning and adjust if necessary.
4. Refrigerate if not to be used immediately; it will keep for about 2 days.
